backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages per-user radio station favorites using a Principal-keyed map, exposing addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: changing GlobeView/FullscreenGlobe backgrounds to solid black, and ensuring all stations (including the currently playing one) appear as globe markers.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based monochrome design tokens for both light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Inter and Fredoka One fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating view switching (stations/favorites/globe), radio playback, favorites CRUD, audio amplitude tracking, and separate React Query fetches for station list and globe stations.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: App header component rendering the Antenna title, a search toggle button, and three view-tab buttons (Stations, Saved, Globe) with active-state styling.
Canvas-based audio frequency bar visualizer that reads from a Web Audio AnalyserNode and renders monochrome greyscale bars, with ResizeObserver for responsive sizing.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: Renders the bottom playback toolbar with volume slider, mute toggle, stop/play/pause controls, fullscreen toggle, theme switcher, and a meatball menu with share and info options.
Renders a Three.js 3D Earth globe with a pulsing marker and expanding ring at the station's country coordinates, used as a fullscreen background.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenOverla: Displays a fullscreen overlay with the 3D globe background, station name, playback status, audio visualizer, and a close button, with fade/slide-in animation.
frontend/src/components/GlobeView.tsx: Renders an interactive 3D globe with clickable/hoverable station markers using Three.js and React Three Fiber, supporting station selection and tooltip display on hover.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper component that provides a full-screen background container for HUD-style child content.
Displays the currently playing station's name, playback/stream health status label, a live blink indicator, and an audio visualizer bar.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based radar widget whose sweep speed and glow intensity react to playback state and audio amplitude, with blip dots and an error state indicator.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: A search panel component with inputs for station name, country (with dropdown autocomplete), and genre tag quick-select buttons that triggers a search callback on interaction.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play/loading indicators, favicons, and favorite toggle buttons, supporting both API RadioStation and backend Station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations via the backend actor, plus a utility to convert RadioStation API objects to backend Station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: Manages audio playback state for a radio player, including play/pause/stop, volume control, Web Audio API analyser setup, stall detection, and automatic retry logic with exponential backoff.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: A hook that persists and toggles between dark and light themes by toggling a CSS class on the document root and storing the preference in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: A hook that requests a screen wake lock when enabled and re-acquires it on tab visibility changes, releasing it when disabled or on cleanup.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines dark and light OKLCH CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds scrollbar, autofill, and fade-in animation styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module for the Radio Browser API providing functions to fetch top stations, globe stations (deduplicated from votes and clickcount), search stations, fetch countries/tags, and register station clicks.
frontend/src/utils/geoMapping.ts: Utility file containing a large lookup table mapping country names to latitude/longitude coordinates for use in globe marker placement.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends fonts, border radii, keyframe animations, and registers the tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Antenna Radio app's current features, known issues (missing globe stations, currently playing station not appearing), and pending fix requests for globe background and station loading.
